response.justification: While Bogdan demonstrates exceptional technical depth (20 years of software development) and strong teaching abilities, he lacks the critical people management experience explicitly required for this mid-to-senior management role (0 years vs. 2+ required). Additionally, his background shows limited specialization in developer tools and build systems—the role's core focus—with most experience concentrated in product engineering, full-stack development, and open-source work. He would be better positioned for a senior IC or technical lead role but is not prepared for this people-leadership position.
strengths: Exceptional technical depth with 20 years of software development across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems demonstrating strong problem-solving ability
Proven ability to communicate and mentor through multiple workshops, courses, and public talks; organized recurring refactoring dojos and code kata sessions showing mentorship instincts
Staff-level experience at multiple companies (Naver, Altom, Dunnhumby) and founding an open-source platform indicating recognition of technical excellence
concerns: Zero evidence of people management experience despite role requiring 2+ years—no mention of managing direct reports, conducting 1-on-1s, performance management, or team development responsibilities

Limited specialization in developer tools, build systems, and testing infrastructure (core role focus); most experience centers on product engineering and full-stack development rather than infrastructure
No demonstrated experience with strategic planning, roadmap development, organizational change leadership, or setting team priorities—critical responsibilities for a Level II Manager
